revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-385

In a radar modulator, an artificial line or ladder network whose parameters are selected to give a specified shape to the modulator pulse.

Reference: I.R.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
